channel.title: Jagjeevan on Kuldeep Singh
channel.description: Recent content in Jagjeevan on Kuldeep Singh

item.title: Dose of Jagjeevan – Balancing the Fourth Pillar of Life!
item.author: thinkuldeep@gmail.com (Kuldeep Singh)
item.description: In my earlier articles, I shared a few life doses from 📕Jagjeevan – Living Larger Than Life. We reflected on staying connected, meeting frequently, and never missing opportunities to come together — whether it’s family gatherings or college reunions. If opportunities don’t arise, create them. In another dose, I shared life lessons straight from the ICU — moments that remind us how fragile and precious life truly is. This time, I want to share another powerful dose inspired by my recent visit to Salasar Balaji Temple in Rajasthan, combined with heartfelt family moments and signing copies of Jagjeevan for loved ones.

item.title: Building the AI-Ready Workforce: Insights from a CXO Roundtable
item.author: thinkuldeep@gmail.com (Kuldeep Singh)
item.description: As artificial intelligence reshapes the enterprise landscape, organizations are being challenged to rethink how they build talent, transform workforce models, and develop future-ready capabilities. For Global Capability Centers (GCCs) and technology leaders, creating scalable capability development strategies and AI-ready talent pipelines is rapidly becoming a key driver of innovation, competitiveness, and long-term business growth. To explore these evolving themes, I had the opportunity to join an exclusive CXO Roundtable on “Talent, Workforce & Capability Transformation for the AI Era,” hosted by CloudThat alongside industry leaders and practitioners shaping India’s global technology ecosystem.

item.title: Jagjeevan Reaches the Temple of Democracy – Parliament of India
item.author: thinkuldeep@gmail.com (Kuldeep Singh)
item.description: In continuation of sharing Jagjeevan doses — moments of reflection inspired by 📕 Jagjeevan: Living Larger Than Life — the journey of this book reached a deeply meaningful milestone: the Parliament of India. It was an honour to present the book to Shri Arjun Ram Meghwal, Hon’ble Minister of State (IC) for Law & Justice and Minister of State for Parliamentary Affairs, Government of India, who also graciously wrote the foreword for the book.

item.title: AI-Assisted Jagjeevan Dose — My ICU Time!
item.author: thinkuldeep@gmail.com (Kuldeep Singh)
item.description: We often hear that times are changing. In the AI era, change is no longer gradual — it is accelerated. Today, AI agents assist us in writing, thinking, researching, and even making personal decisions. Many of us now do something unimaginable a few years ago: We even confirm what our doctors say… with AI. AI explains reports. AI answers late-night doubts. AI reassures us when anxiety grows. It is that second opinion!

item.title: Mastering Python - AI Writes Code. Developers Must Understand It
item.author: thinkuldeep@gmail.com (Kuldeep Singh)
item.description: AI can generate code in seconds. As a result, the role of developers is rapidly shifting—from writing code to reviewing, guiding, and constraining AI-generated outputs to ensure they truly fit the need. However, effective code review is not easy. The expertise required to review AI-generated code cannot exist without first writing code yourself. First-hand experience—debugging, structuring, breaking, and fixing systems—is what builds the intuition needed to evaluate correctness, performance, and maintainability.

item.title: Jagjeevan at Silver Jubilee of Millennium Batch NIT Kurukshetra
item.author: thinkuldeep@gmail.com (Kuldeep Singh)
item.description: In earlier article, I talked about the effort to meet and reconnect with friends and family always fills you up—it gives you a true Dose of Jagjeevan I recently received a powerful one at the Silver Jubilee celebration of my Millennium (2K) Batch at NIT Kurukshetra. It was deeply heartwarming to reconnect with old friends, relive shared memories, and celebrate the journey we began together more than two decades ago.

item.title: Dose of Jagjeevan - Frequently meet and greet your family!
item.author: thinkuldeep@gmail.com (Kuldeep Singh)
item.description: Taking a break from our daily routine to spend time with family often feels harder than it should be. Busy schedules, long travel, work pressure, health concerns, distance, or even unresolved misunderstandings slowly become convenient excuses. Yet, deep down, we all know this truth: family gatherings are essential for our mental peace and happiness. We celebrate festivals, birthdays, anniversaries, and milestones to strengthen family bonds and create memories that last a lifetime.

item.title: 📕 Available Now! Jagjeevan : Living Larger than Life
item.author: thinkuldeep@gmail.com (Kuldeep Singh)
item.description: 📕 Jagjeevan: Living Larger Than Life is a heartfelt tribute to the extraordinary life and timeless wisdom of Shri Jagguram—an enlightened soul whose values shaped generations. Blending personal memories with profound life lessons, it captures the essence of a man who lived with humility, discipline, compassion, and unwavering purpose. Through ten insightful chapters, the book explores heritage, resilience, responsibility, inner strength, family unity, conflict resolution, gratitude, and the power of one’s actions.

item.title: 📕Jagjeevan launch@Thoughtworks
item.author: thinkuldeep@gmail.com (Kuldeep Singh)
item.description: Thoughtworks, Thoughtworkers, and books share a deep and enduring connection. Over the years, hundreds of books have been authored by Thoughtworkers, reflecting a culture rooted in thought leadership, learning, and knowledge sharing. As part of this vibrant thought-sharing community, I recently had the privilege of launching my book 📕 Jagjeevan: Living Larger than Life at the Thoughtworks office and signing copies for colleagues. The moment was special—not just because it was a book launch, but because it was about sharing timeless life lessons and inspirations drawn from the life of my great-grandfather, lessons that feel especially relevant in today’s fast-paced world.

item.title: XR Symposium Takeaways and Book Launch at IIT Madras
item.author: thinkuldeep@gmail.com (Kuldeep Singh)
item.description: I recently had the privilege of speaking at XR Symposium 2025, hosted by XTIC, IIT Madras. My heartfelt thanks to Prof. Mani and his team for the kind invitation and to Thoughtworks for making all the arrangements seamless. The event was nothing short of extraordinary – a world-class symposium showcasing groundbreaking advancements, with an exciting lineup of sessions led by industry pioneers and academics. The topics covered were diverse, thought-provoking, and visionary.

item.title: Speaker | Gatherverse Book Summit 2025
item.author: thinkuldeep@gmail.com (Kuldeep Singh)
item.description: 📢 Gatherverse Book Summit 2025: Exploring Books, Language and Meaning in the Age of New Technology. In the intersection of emerging technologies and humanity, this GatherVerse event aims to deep dive into the current and future state of books in an age defined by artificial intelligence. This is a space for authors, researchers, engineers, ethicists, educators, publishers, technologists and readers. We explore what it means to write, publish, and trust books in a time where machine-generated language is flooding the landscape

item.title: 📕 Coming Soon! Jagjeevan : Living Larger than Life
item.author: thinkuldeep@gmail.com (Kuldeep Singh)
item.description: Life teaches us lessons every single moment—but only when we pause to reflect do we truly grow. Everyone faces challenges; no life is free from problems. What defines us is not the struggle, but how we rise above it. Most challenges we encounter today are the same ones our previous generations faced—whether they relate to daily life, relationships, earning, spending, or navigating responsibilities. So much wisdom already exists around us, in our homes, in our traditions, in the stories of our elders.

item.title: Books
item.author: thinkuldeep@gmail.com (Kuldeep Singh)
item.description: 📕 Jagjeevan Living Larger than Life 📕 Jagjeevan: Living Larger Than Life is a heartfelt tribute to the extraordinary life and timeless wisdom of Shri Jagguram—an enlightened soul whose values shaped generations. Blending personal memories with profound life lessons, it captures the essence of a man who lived with humility, discipline, compassion, and unwavering purpose. Through ten insightful chapters, the book explores heritage, resilience, responsibility, inner strength, family unity, conflict resolution, gratitude, and the power of one’s actions.

item.title: How Small, How Big: Seeing Life Through the Lens of the Universe
item.author: thinkuldeep@gmail.com (Kuldeep Singh)
item.description: After a few hectic months, I recently visited a camping site with my family — a truly refreshing experience being close to nature. The trip was hosted by Camp Gopika and accompanied by Astrostop, adding a unique touch to our stay. The serene environment gave me time to reflect on life and also work on the final touches of my upcoming book, 📕 “Jagjeevan – Living Larger than Life”, which tells the story of my great-grandfather and his belief that travel is essential for learning and introspection.
